requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport Safety Testing — UN 38.3 (China to Bulgaria)
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输安全测试——UN 38.3（中国至保加利亚）
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸安全測試——UN 38.3（中國至保加利亞）

summary.en: All lithium cells and batteries (including BESS modules) shipped internationally must pass the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 test series (T1–T8: altitude simulation, thermal, vibration, shock, external short circuit, impact/crush, overcharge, forced discharge). The current edition is Rev.8 (2023) with Amendment 1 (2025) (ST/SG/AC.10/11/Rev.8). A UN 38.3 test summary or full test report must accompany each shipment. The UN number classification is UN 3480 (lithium-ion batteries, packed alone) or UN 3481 (lithium-ion batteries contained in or packed with equipment). For sea freight to Bulgaria, the typical routing is via Black Sea ports (Varna or Burgas) under IMDG Code. Road transport within Bulgaria and EU transit is governed by ADR (European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road).
summary.zh: 所有国际运输的锂电芯及电池（包括BESS模块）须通过《联合国关于危险货物运输的建议书——试验和标准手册》第三部分第38.3节T1–T8系列测试。现行版本为Rev.8（2023年）及修正案1（2025年）。每票货物须随附UN 38.3测试摘要或完整报告。UN编号分类为UN 3480或UN 3481。海运至保加利亚通常经黑海港口（瓦尔纳或布尔加斯）按IMDG Code规管。保加利亚境内及欧盟过境公路运输受ADR规管。
summary.zht: 所有國際運輸的鋰電芯及電池（包括BESS模組）須通過《聯合國關於危險貨物運輸的建議書——試驗和標準手冊》第三部分第38.3節T1–T8系列測試。現行版本為Rev.8（2023年）及修正案1（2025年）。每票貨物須隨附UN 38.3測試摘要或完整報告。UN編號分類為UN 3480或UN 3481。海運至保加利亞通常經黑海港口（瓦爾納或布爾加斯）按IMDG Code規管。保加利亞境內及歐盟過境公路運輸受ADR規管。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (ST/SG/AC.10/11/Rev.8 (2023) and Amendment 1 (2025))
UN Model Regulations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, 23rd revised edition — UN 3480 / UN 3481
ADR 2025 — European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road (Special Provisions 188, 230, 310, 348, 636, 670)
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) 65th Edition 2024 — Special Provisions A88, A99, A154, A164, A183, A201, A206

summary.en: China applies the same UN 38.3 test standard for export shipments and mirrors it in national regulations. For road transport, the standard GB 15599 (Safety requirements for transport of lithium batteries by road) references UN 38.3. Export customs and the Ministry of Transport require a valid UN 38.3 test report and dangerous goods declaration (危险货物运输申报) per JT/T 617 (road) and IMDG/IATA rules for maritime/air. The Civil Aviation Administration of China (CAAC) DGR follows IATA. The exact current edition of GB 15599 and any amendments issued after 2024 are not publicly confirmable via open sources — verify the current edition via SAC or the Ministry of Transport before relying on it.
summary.zh: 中国对出口货物同样适用UN 38.3测试标准，并在国内法规中予以对应。公路运输参照GB 15599（锂电池公路运输安全要求），该标准引用UN 38.3。海关及交通运输部要求持有效UN 38.3测试报告并按JT/T 617（公路）及IMDG/IATA规则进行危险货物申报。中国民用航空局（CAAC）危险品规则遵循IATA。
summary.zht: 中國對出口貨物同樣適用UN 38.3測試標準，並在國內法規中予以對應。公路運輸參照GB 15599（鋰電池公路運輸安全要求），該標準引用UN 38.3。海關及交通運輸部要求持有效UN 38.3測試報告並按JT/T 617（公路）及IMDG/IATA規則進行危險貨物申報。中國民用航空局（CAAC）危險品規則遵循IATA。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3 (adopted for export)
GB 38031-2020 — Electric vehicles traction battery safety requirements (cell-level UN 38.3 equivalent)
GB 15599 — Safety requirements for transport of lithium batteries by road (current edition not publicly confirmable via open sources — verify via SAC or Ministry of Transport before relying on it)
JT/T 617 — Regulations for road transport of dangerous goods
CAAC Dangerous Goods Regulations (aligned with IATA DGR)

gap.en: Both EU/international and China require UN 38.3 testing, so the test protocol itself is not a gap. The gaps lie in documentation and enforcement: (1) EU/ADR strictly enforces the UN 38.3 test summary requirement at the shipper level — Chinese exporters sometimes hold only a product certificate without the full T1–T8 summary. (2) ADR 2025 introduces updated provisions on state-of-charge (SOC ≤30%) limits and packaging requirements for large-format BESS cells. (3) IATA PI 965/966/967 Section II thresholds (Wh limits per package) are strictly enforced by EU carriers; Chinese air-freight agents occasionally mis-classify oversized BESS modules. (4) Shipments to Bulgaria via Black Sea (Varna/Burgas) must comply with IMDG Code; multimodal re-documentation to ADR is required at port of entry for onward road transport within Bulgaria and the EU. (5) Some EU member states including Bulgaria may require additional consignment notifications for BESS transported by road above certain energy thresholds.
gap.zh: 欧盟/国际与中国均要求UN 38.3测试，测试协议本身不构成差距。差距在于文件与执法：(1) 欧盟/ADR严格要求提供UN 38.3测试摘要，部分中国出口商仅持产品证书而无完整摘要；(2) ADR 2025对大型BESS电芯的荷电状态（SOC≤30%）及包装要求有更新规定；(3) IATA PI 965/966/967 Section II瓦时限值由欧洲承运人严格执行；(4) 经黑海（瓦尔纳/布尔加斯）到保加利亚的货物须按IMDG Code规管，在入境港须按ADR重新出具文件以用于境内公路运输；(5) 包括保加利亚在内的部分欧盟成员国对超过一定能量阈值的BESS公路运输可能要求额外货运通知。
gap.zht: 歐盟/國際與中國均要求UN 38.3測試，測試協議本身不構成差距。差距在於文件與執法：(1) 歐盟/ADR嚴格要求提供UN 38.3測試摘要，部分中國出口商僅持產品證書而無完整摘要；(2) ADR 2025對大型BESS電芯的荷電狀態（SOC≤30%）及包裝要求有更新規定；(3) IATA PI 965/966/967 Section II瓦時限值由歐洲承運人嚴格執行；(4) 經黑海（瓦爾納/布爾加斯）到保加利亞的貨物須按IMDG Code規管，在入境港須按ADR重新出具文件以用於境內公路運輸；(5) 包括保加利亞在內的部分歐盟成員國對超過一定能量閾值的BESS公路運輸可能要求額外貨運通知。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 compliance and dangerous goods documentation are legal requirements for all international transport modes under ADR/IMDG/IATA and are enforced by carriers, freight forwarders, and customs authorities. Port of Varna and Port of Burgas apply IMDG Code; ADR applies for all Bulgarian and EU road legs.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export — UN 38.3 test report required by customs and carriers; GB 38031-2020 mandatory for EV battery cells sold in China.

source.publisher: Energy and Water Regulatory Commission (EWRC), Bulgaria

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. A Chinese BESS exporter shipping to Bulgaria must hold a valid UN 38.3 test report (T1–T8 summary) for every cell/module type, classify under UN 3480 or UN 3481, comply with IMDG (sea via Varna/Burgas), ADR (road within Bulgaria and EU), or IATA (air) packaging and documentation requirements, and ensure SOC does not exceed 30% where required. Multimodal shipments require ADR re-documentation at Bulgarian port of entry. Consult a certified dangerous goods safety adviser (DGSA) before first shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。中国BESS出口商向保加利亚发货，须为每种电芯/模块型号持有有效UN 38.3测试报告（T1–T8摘要），按UN 3480或UN 3481分类，并符合IMDG（经瓦尔纳/布尔加斯海运）、ADR（保加利亚境内及欧盟公路段）或IATA（空运）包装及文件要求，并在规定情况下确保荷电状态不超过30%。多式联运须在保加利亚入境港补充ADR文件。首次发货前请咨询具资质的危险品安全顾问（DGSA）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。中國BESS出口商向保加利亞發貨，須為每種電芯/模組型號持有有效UN 38.3測試報告（T1–T8摘要），按UN 3480或UN 3481分類，並符合IMDG（經瓦爾納/布爾加斯海運）、ADR（保加利亞境內及歐盟公路段）或IATA（空運）包裝及文件要求，並在規定情況下確保荷電狀態不超過30%。多式聯運須在保加利亞入境港補充ADR文件。首次發貨前請諮詢具資質的危險品安全顧問（DGSA）。
